module_sme_rollup.name: Project Setup & Structure
module_sme_rollup.description: Create, organize, and template projects with clear hierarchy, scope, and traceability.

statements.text: Create project master records with core attributes, status lifecycle, and customer/contract linkage.
Organize projects into phases, milestones, and nested work breakdown structure with reusable templates.
Define project scope of work and apply custom fields and tags for business classification.
Support multi-project programme hierarchies with consolidated portfolio-level reporting and governance.

module_sme_rollup.name: Task Execution & Tracking
module_sme_rollup.description: Assign, schedule, and monitor work with dependencies, status workflows, and real-time visibility.

statements.text: Create and assign tasks with priority, deadline, assignee, subtasks, and hierarchical decomposition.
Define task dependencies with multiple link types and auto-calculate dates forward from project start.
Implement task status workflow with drag-and-drop transitions, checklists, and real-time progress dashboard.
Support dynamic task rescheduling and reassignment with notifications for urgent or unplanned work.
Display interactive Gantt chart with critical path highlighting, baseline overlay, and milestone markers.

module_sme_rollup.name: Resource & Cost Management
module_sme_rollup.description: Allocate resources, track time and expenses, and monitor budget versus actual costs.

statements.text: Assign team members to projects with estimated effort hours and view capacity utilisation heatmap.
Maintain centralised resource pool with skills, certifications, cost rates, and availability calendars.
Log billable and non-billable hours against projects with real-time timer and timesheet approval workflow.
Capture and approve expenses by category with billable classification and multi-currency conversion.
Define project budgets by cost category and alert when actual spend exceeds configurable threshold.
Calculate labour costs automatically from timesheets and display actual versus planned expenditure dashboard.

module_sme_rollup.name: Billing, Revenue & Financial Reporting
module_sme_rollup.description: Generate invoices, recognize revenue, and report project profitability and financial performance.

statements.text: Generate invoices from time-and-materials, fixed-price, and progress-based billing with configurable rates.
Post invoices to accounts receivable and consolidate multiple project invoices into single customer invoice.
Define revenue recognition schedules by project with deferred revenue tracking and ASC 606 compliance.
Calculate project profitability as revenue minus direct and indirect costs with margin analysis by type.
Report unbilled time and expenses for review before invoicing and track retainer drawdowns.

module_sme_rollup.name: Collaboration, Risk & Change Management
module_sme_rollup.description: Enable team communication, manage risks and issues, and control scope changes.

statements.text: Store project files centrally with version history, threaded comments, @mentions, and activity feed.
Capture risks with probability, impact, and mitigation plans; log issues with severity and resolution tracking.
Route change requests through multi-level approval workflow and auto-update project plan and budget.
Configure multi-level approval chains with mandatory field validation and escalation on time thresholds.
Send email and in-app notifications for task assignments, deadline reminders, and milestone alerts.

module_sme_rollup.name: Reporting, Analytics & Governance
module_sme_rollup.description: Deliver real-time dashboards, custom reports, and audit trails for stakeholder visibility and compliance.

statements.text: Display project status dashboard with RAG health indicators, milestone tracker, and budget variance.
Provide resource utilisation report identifying allocation gaps and on-time/on-budget completion rates.
Enable custom report builder with configurable filters, grouping, and export to CSV/PDF with scheduled delivery.
Maintain comprehensive audit trail of user actions, consent, and data changes with encryption at rest and in transit.
Implement role-based access control by project with two-factor authentication and single sign-on integration.
Provide REST API and import/export via CSV/Excel for integration with accounting and calendar systems.
Enable customer portal for project visibility, deliverable sign-off, change requests, and invoice review.
Support mobile and multi-device access with responsive UI for time entry, task updates, and dashboard viewing.

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your project data is accessible, secure, and connected to your other business systems. Singapore SMEs must comply with PDPA regulations and protect client information, while your team needs to work from anywhere—office, site, or home. Without mobile access and proper data security, you risk compliance breaches and lose visibility when your team is in the field.

Project Core.narrative: This family is the heart of project management—it lets you break down work into tasks, assign them to team members, track progress, and keep everyone aligned through shared documents and reminders. For a Singapore SME juggling multiple clients or internal projects, this prevents tasks from slipping through the cracks and ensures deadlines are met. A construction firm using templates can spin up a new site project in minutes; a consulting firm gets instant visibility when a deliverable is overdue.

Time & Resources.narrative: This family captures how your team spends time and money on projects, so you know what each project actually costs and whether you're making a profit. For a Singapore SME that bills clients by the hour or needs to control project spend, accurate time and expense tracking is the difference between a healthy margin and a loss. A software development firm uses timesheets to bill clients fairly; a design agency tracks materials and contractor costs to avoid budget overruns.

Financial Control.narrative: This family ties project costs to revenue—you set a budget, track spending in real time, and generate invoices directly from project data. Singapore SMEs need this to stay profitable and to invoice clients accurately and on time. A project that runs over budget is caught early; a time-and-materials project is invoiced automatically as hours are logged, speeding up cash flow.

Delivery & Tracking.narrative: This family gives you visibility into project schedules, risks, and customer sign-offs—so you deliver on time and manage surprises before they derail the plan. For a Singapore SME, a Gantt chart shows whether you're on track; a risk register catches problems early; a customer portal keeps clients informed and reduces scope creep. A renovation contractor uses Gantt charts to coordinate trades; a marketing agency uses issue tracking to flag campaign delays.

Analytics & Reporting.narrative: This family turns project data into dashboards and reports that show leadership whether projects are on time, on budget, and profitable. For a Singapore SME, standard reports on project status and cost help you make faster decisions and spot patterns—like which project types are most profitable or which teams are overloaded. A growing SME uses these insights to improve pricing and resource planning.
